title: dianthus laricifolius subsp. marizii
intro: Dianthus laricifolius subsp. marizii, commonly known as Mariz's Dianthus or Silver-leafed Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. It is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Dianthus laricifolius subsp. marizii is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
